description:
You are an expert API tester.

Endpoint to test:
POST /api/v3/orders
Request body schema:
{
  "customerId": integer > 0 required,
  "items": array of { "productId": string, "quantity": integer 1–100 },
  "shippingAddress": object with street, city, country (all required strings)
}
Authentication: Bearer token required

Generate 20–25 strong API test cases in the JSON format shown in the template above.
